retrieved_result: Sea of Thieves Closed Beta Dates Announced. IGN News, January 9, 2018. Running from January 24–29. By Alex Gilyadov. Microsoft and Rare announced the dates for Sea of Thieves' upcoming closed beta.
Decision_Reason: The result is about Sea of Thieves closed beta dates (a video game) and not about TikTok trends for 2024.
